Container.Name: scan-treatment
Container.Overview: Automatic scanner PDF processing. Optimizes B&W and color scans and uploads them directly to Paperless-ngx via API. Multi-page document assembly is triggered via a Home Assistant button.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Base data directory. Contains /import (scanner target) and /export (processed files).

Config.Name: HTTP Trigger Port
Config.Description: Port for the trigger endpoint. Call GET/POST http://<host>:8080/trigger to start multi-page processing. Can be triggered by Home Assistant, curl, or any HTTP client.

Config.Name: Paperless URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Paperless-ngx instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.x:8000). Leave empty to keep files in /data/export instead.

Config.Name: Paperless API Token
Config.Description: API token for Paperless-ngx. Found in the Django admin panel (/admin) under Tokens.

Config.Name: B&W Filename Pattern
Config.Description: Filename prefix identifying B&W scans (e.g. scan-bw → matches scan-bw.pdf, scan-bw-multi.pdf).

Config.Name: Multi-Page Filename Pattern
Config.Description: Substring identifying multi-page scans (e.g. multi → matches scan-bw-multi.pdf, scan-color-multi.pdf).

Config.Name: Disable Multi Mode
Config.Description: Set to true if your printer natively produces multi-page PDFs. Every file will be processed immediately, MULTI_PATTERN is ignored.

Config.Name: B&W Density (DPI)
Config.Description: DPI density for ImageMagick B&W processing. Leave empty to use the image default. See README for current default value.

Config.Name: B&W Processing Parameters
Config.Description: ImageMagick parameters for B&W processing. Leave empty to use the image default. See README for current default value.

Config.Name: Color Processing Parameters
Config.Description: Ghostscript parameters for color processing. Leave empty to use the image default. See README for current default value.

Config.Name: Trigger Timeout (seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds to wait for the Home Assistant trigger before automatically proceeding with multi-mode processing.

Config.Name: Upload Retry Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds between Paperless upload retries on failure.

Config.Name: Telegram Bot Token
Config.Description: Optional Telegram bot token for notifications (e.g. successful upload, errors).

Config.Name: Telegram Chat ID
Config.Description: Optional Telegram chat ID for notifications.

Config.Name: Telegram Notify on Success
Config.Description: Set to true to also send a Telegram notification on successful uploads. By default only errors are reported.

Config.Name: eSCL B&W DPI
Config.Description: DPI for B&W scans triggered via /scan/single/bw and /scan/multi/bw. Requires PRINTER_IP and eSCL enabled on the printer.

Config.Name: eSCL Color DPI
Config.Description: DPI for color scans triggered via /scan/single/color and /scan/multi/color. Requires PRINTER_IP and eSCL enabled on the printer.

Config.Name: Printer Notify
Config.Description: Set to true to update the matching scan job's display name in the printer menu after each multi-page batch (e.g. "My Scan Job [OK 14:32]"). Requires PRINTER_IP.

Config.Name: Printer IP
Config.Description: IP address of the printer (required when PRINTER_NOTIFY=true). Tested with HP LaserJet MFP M130fw.

Config.Name: Printer User Filter
Config.Description: Optional: only update scan jobs whose display name contains this string. Useful when multiple containers share one printer.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for log timestamps and output filenames (e.g. Europe/London, America/New_York).
